title: cinnamomum alternifolium
intro: Cinnamomum alternifolium is a species of evergreen tree in the family Lauraceae, commonly known as Indian cinnamon or Malay cinnamon. The medicinal properties of Cinnamomum alternifolium lie in its bark, which contains cinnamaldehyde, a compound with antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Cinnamomum alternifolium is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
